meaning: adj.阿比西尼亚的n.阿比西尼亚人,依索比亚人
examples: Breeders and owners of Siamese, Abyssinian and other special pedigrees will be exempted from the new regime.
Because there's always people like, you know, I think of Reverend Butts of Abyssinian Baptist.
Butts III, the ambitious pastor of the 190-year-old Abyssinian Baptist Church on 138th Street.
